_meta.purpose: Human-labeled (check, workflow_output, gold_verdict) triples to calibrate the workflow judge. Stratified across the six check_types (presence, format, constraints, completeness, correctness, hallucination). Gold verdict is one of PASS/FAIL/WARN; gold_confidence_band optional. Authored alongside the per-check_type rubric in workflow_validator.py — keep in sync when rubric anchors change.
labelling_rules: PASS: check is clearly satisfied by visible content.
WARN: partially met or a minor issue that does not invalidate the output.
NEEDS_INVESTIGATION is reserved for genuinely ambiguous outputs; we don't include those in calibration so the κ statistic is well-defined.
